mapper.sql: SELECT c.claimNo, c.orderNo, c.orderItemNo, o.memberUid, m.name AS memberName, oi.productName, oi.optionText, c.quantity, c.claimType, c.claimContent, c.fileId, c.claimStatus, oi.itemStatus, sh.shipmentNo, sh.status AS shipmentStatus, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, o.receiver, o.phone, o.zipCode, o.addr1, o.addr2, c.requestedAt, c.processedAt FROM claim c JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = c.orderItemNo JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = c.orderNo LEFT JOIN `member` m ON m.uid = o.memberUid LEFT JOIN shipment_item si ON si.orderItemNo = c.orderItemNo LEFT JOIN shipment sh ON sh.shipmentNo = si.shipmentNo LEFT JOIN shipment newer_sh ON newer_sh.shipmentNo > sh.shipmentNo AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipment_item newer_si WHERE newer_si.shipmentNo = newer_sh.shipmentNo AND newer_si.orderItemNo = c.orderItemNo ) WHERE newer_sh.shipmentNo IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE claim SET claimStatus = #{claimStatus}, processedAt = CASE WHEN #{claimStatus} IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'COMPLETED') THEN NOW() ELSE processedAt END WHERE claimNo = #{claimNo}

UPDATE claim c JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = c.orderItemNo SET c.claimStatus = 'COMPLETED', c.processedAt = NOW() WHERE c.claimType = 'EXCHANGE' AND c.claimStatus = 'RESHIPPING' AND oi.itemStatus = 'DELIVERED'

UPDATE claim c JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = c.orderItemNo SET c.claimStatus = 'COMPLETED', c.processedAt = NOW() WHERE c.claimType = 'RETURN' AND c.claimStatus = 'APPROVED' AND oi.itemStatus = 'RETURNED'
